assumptions: Small cavity-nesting chickadees using residential edge, open woodland, or mixed woody habitat.
Nest box is mounted 5 to 15 feet above ground and within about 30 feet of woody cover.
Entrance faces away from prevailing storm wind; east or southeast is a good default when local conditions allow.

entrance_diameter.reason: Larger entrances admit bigger competitors and make predator access easier.

cedar_laminate.description: Preferred wildlife-first laser profile: untreated cedar laminated from three 1/4 inch laser-cut plies.
cedar_laminate.finish_outside: raw or light exterior water-based finish outside only
notes: Confirm cedar is allowed on the specific laser; resinous stock can flare.
Sand loose char from interior faces and let adhesive cure fully before field use.

exterior_plywood.description: Laser-friendly fallback when the shop confirms exterior plywood adhesive is safe to cut.
exterior_plywood.finish_outside: light exterior water-based finish outside only
notes: Do not use MDF, pressure-treated stock, painted stock, unknown reclaimed wood, PVC, or interior plywood with unknown glue.
Treat plywood lifespan as shorter than solid cedar and inspect annually for delamination.

cut_order: score fledgling grip and roof drip lines
cut entrance, vent slots, drain notches, and mounting holes

mounting.orientation: away from prevailing wind; east or southeast when practical
mounting.predator_protection: smooth metal pole plus stovepipe or cone baffle preferred

validation_checks.fail_remedy: Remove perch and seal exterior-only fastener holes.

validation_checks.method: visual and touch inspection before assembly
validation_checks.fail_remedy: Reject finished interior parts or recut untreated plies.

validation_checks.target: Four corner drain notches remain open
validation_checks.method: 250 mL water clears visible pooling within 60 seconds

validation_checks.target: Three protected side vent slots per side
validation_checks.method: Smoke or fog near entrance visibly exits side vents
validation_checks.fail_remedy: Clear vent slots or recut side plies.

validation_checks.target: Horizontal grip scores below entrance on inside front
validation_checks.fail_remedy: Add shallow horizontal grooves before closing box.

validation_checks.target: Pole mount includes stovepipe or cone baffle where possible
Side or roof opens for annual cleanout and latches securely
